setup-handover.title: Setup & handover — get bot and webhooks live in the LS Discord server
setup-handover.notes: No code. Owner does 3 tasks (invite bot, create webhooks, test channel), then Brad tests and switches to live.

tasks.text: Owner: Invite Slop bot to LS server
Owner: Create announcement webhook, send URL
Owner: Create yap webhook, send URL
Owner: Create #slop-testing channel + webhook
Brad: Test webhook post in #slop-testing
Brad: Test @Slop mention in #slop-testing
Brad: Test full ingestion pipeline
Brad: Switch to live channels + redeploy
Brad: Delete test channel, confirm first real ingestion

data-refinement.title: Data refinement & hygiene — finish descriptions/notes quality pass and edge cleanup
data-refinement.notes: Core type migration and date population are complete. Remaining work is quality completion for ainews/article/guest/entity notes and edge-context cleanup.

tasks.text: Phase 0: Audit + graph structure decision (flat types, no hubs)
Phase 1: Node type migration + junk cleanup + duplicate merges
Phase 1: Publish dates for all content nodes

Phase 2: AINews descriptions + notes
Phase 2: Article descriptions + notes
Phase 2: Guest descriptions + notes
Phase 2: Entity descriptions + notes
Phase 2: Edge context cleanup + verification pass

graph-bot-polish.title: Graph & bot final polish — companion linking, entity extraction fix, Slop-first bot strategy, dashboard type breakdown
graph-bot-polish.notes: Code complete. Manual follow-ups: run companion backfill script, run entity extraction backfill, reclassify node 4050, implement Slop persona in latent-space-bots repo.

tasks.text: Part 1: Companion detection + edge creation for podcast/article pairs

completed.title: Identity, dev process & repo cleanup — establish LSH as the product, set up workflow, fix stale code
Schema cleanup + typed entity model — finalize DB structure with node_type, port RA-H UX
